COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-04-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-07-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for terms of the settlement to be placed on the record this date.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Irene Burns
Anthony Head, Esq., for Plaintiff: Bridgeport Financial, Inc., Jeniffer Randell, true party in interest present, was sworn and examined.
Jon P. Harward, Esq. for Defendant: Thomas Moody present, was sworn and examined.
Terms of the settlement were placed on the record as follows:
Stipulated judgment pending plan: $5,000.00 to be paid within 90 days from today thru August 2005. Beginning thereafter, 20 consecutive months at $1,000.00 each. At the conclusion of payment plan matter will be dismissed with prejudice. If payment plan is breached, plaintiff will give 10 days written notice to Mr. Moody's counsel. Matter may be cured at that time, if not cured, during the 10 days grace period, then plaintiff is entitled to an Ex Parte Entry of Judgment for the full principal amount prayed for in the complaint, plus interest, court cost, and attorney fees less any payment that have been paid by Mr. Moody up until that time.
Matter is set in Dept. 212 on March 7, 2006 at 10:00 a.m. for CRC 225 hearing. Counsel to submit one month's notice in advance of March 7, 2006 assuming payments are on going. Dept. 212 to continue CRC 225 to a future date.
